title: [Vic's Point Blank] The Last of Z Weapon Pack
description: A content pack for Vic's Point Blank that adds two weapons to Minecraft, commissioned by NightWeaver9.
body:
This is a content pack for Vic's Point Blank commissioned by NightWeaver9 that features 2 weapons.
- R11 RSASS (Compatible with scopes, sights, muzzles, and underbarrel grips)
- A throwable Tomahawk

![R11 RSASS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FR7j3ptg/images/fd6221d51983f4d17fda12cc60c60129426c8309.png)
![Tomahawk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FR7j3ptg/images/972d4179cd7e7cf50c553069beaf0a9163fbc721.png)

This pack also contains an alternate skin for both weapons.

Credits:  
CD Projekt RED: Tomahawk SFX from Cyberpunk 2077  
vic4games & vic4gamesteam: Gun SFX from Vic's Point Blank
